result.status_detail: 차단 warning rendered: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — RRN blocked, W1+W2 regression confirmed clean

notes: W1+W2 struct-collapse regression. perplexity.ai hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R), typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', submitted, waited 60s. Answer body replaced with APF block warning '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' — verified via Copy button -> clipboard read AND screenshot. Expected post-block 'connection cut' artifact also present (consistent with prior runs).
